aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing structured data and conversational content gaps.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is operational but lacks optimization in photos, posts, and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between GBP and website

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate with a phone number discrepancy identified.
action_items: Update the phone number on the website to match GBP
Ensure consistent NAP across all online directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a reliable HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Jacksonville, FL
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed service guides and customer testimonials

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads as AI assistants overlook their business.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No structured data or FAQ content to support AI citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Jacksonville
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more AI-driven leads for your business.
nap_issues: Phone mismatch: Website has (904) 512-0091, GBP has (904) 786-3300
